query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN passportNumber IS NOT NULL AND passportNumber != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_passport
FROM flight_tickets WHERE registrationId >= 630000;
